---
title: "get_markets"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_markets()`

Get Markets

## Usage

```r
get_markets(
  status = NULL,
  series_ticker = NULL,
  event_ticker = NULL,
  tickers = NULL,
  limit = 100,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `status` | Character. Filter by status: "unopened", "open", "closed", "settled". |
| `series_ticker` | Character. Filter by series ticker. |
| `event_ticker` | Character. Filter by event ticker. |
| `tickers` | Character vector. Specific market tickers to retrieve. |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-1000). Defaults to 100. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. Defaults to NULL. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with market information including ticker, title, status,
yes_price, no_price, volume, and other market details.

## Description

Retrieves a list of markets with optional filtering. Handles pagination
automatically to return all matching results.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get all open markets
markets <- get_markets(status = "open")

# Get markets for a specific series
markets <- get_markets(series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other markets: 
`get_candlesticks()`,
`get_market()`,
`get_orderbook()`,
`get_trades()`
